title: verbascum bombyciferum
intro: Verbascum bombyciferum, also known as Molucella or Large Mullein, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Verbascum bombyciferum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
